Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator to appear on July 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why she has not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Final Distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mattie Wallace in Propria Persona.
Natasha Morris also present.

Ms. Wallace stated that she is the sole beneficiary, that she understands that she can't withdraw any money without a Court order, and that she has to file an inventory and appraisal. Ms. Morris stated that there is one rental property which is a duplex in Berkeley. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with limited authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for June 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for February 5, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Continued To Jan-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
